center.name: 喀布尔
center.summary: 喀布尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括青头鹦鹉，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bird can also be found in small pockets of mountainous areas in the provinces of Kabul, Logar, Nangarhar, and Paktia in Afghanistan

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The bird can also be found in small pockets of mountainous areas in the provinces of Kabul, Logar, Nangarhar, and Paktia in Afghanistan
